plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the cached selectors used in DETERMINISTIC mode no longer match the UI. Labels like 'Last Name' and 'Email Address' in the UI differ from the cached 'Your Name' and 'Contact Email', and the 'Select your occupation' element is missing entirely.
observedIndicators: UI labels in screenshot ('Last Name', 'Email Address') do not match cached selector labels ('Your Name', 'Contact Email')
High flakiness score (0.88) with alternating success/failure pattern in history
Instruction 'Fill out all survey questions' is semantically flexible

remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache and retry the test. The autonomous agent will re-scan the page and adapt to the current form fields (e.g., Age Group instead of Occupation).

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic mode for unstable UI.
remediationSteps.details: Consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific test if the target application is known to be dynamically unstable/A-B tested, as the cache will frequently break.

plan.notes: The 'unstable-survey' app appears to intentionally vary its form structure. The high flakiness score and alternating success/failure pattern in history confirm that the DETERMINISTIC cache becomes stale immediately when the form layout changes. Clearing the cache will allow the AI to adapt to the current form version.
